scripts.dev: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('../data')) { fs.mkdirSync('public/data', {recursive: true}); fs.readdirSync('../data').forEach(f => { if(f.endsWith('.csv') || f.endsWith('.json')) fs.copyFileSync('../data/' + f, 'public/data/' + f); }); }" && vite
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('public/data', {recursive: true}); fs.readdirSync('../data').forEach(f => { if(f.endsWith('.csv') || f.endsWith('.json')) fs.copyFileSync('../data/' + f, 'public/data/' + f); });" && vite build
